"Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "### Impact
The HTML output format in wlc embeds API response data into HTML without escaping, allowing cross-site scripting when the output is rendered in a browser.


### Patches
* https://github.com/WeblateOrg/wlc/pull/1327

### Workarounds
The only vulnerable code path is HTML output which is opt-in.

### References
Weblate thanks @fg0x0 for reporting this on GitHub.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00174, "percentile": 0.06994}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-gx2m-mcc2-r4p3", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-24T20:43:30Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gx2m-mcc2-r4p3", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-gx2m-mcc2-r4p3"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42150"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-08T04:16:18Z", "published_at": "2026-04-24T20:43:30Z", "references": ["https://github.com/WeblateOrg/wlc/security/advisories/GHSA-gx2m-mcc2-r4p3", "https://github.com/WeblateOrg/wlc/pull/1327", "https://github.com/WeblateOrg/wlc/commit/0f3e58f6d7457b05d48ef40f579a172c4c8b8469", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42150", "https://github.com/WeblateOrg/wlc/releases/tag/2.0.0", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gx2m-mcc2-r4p3"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/WeblateOrg/wlc/security-advisories/GHSA-gx2m-mcc2-r4p3", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/WeblateOrg/wlc", "summary": "wlc: print_html outputs API data without HTML escaping", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-12T13:27:33Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-gx2m-mcc2-r4p3", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.0.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "wlc"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.0.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
